title: How to Start a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: AI Master reviews Rocket 1.0 as a solution to context loss across disconnected AI tools in workflows. The video demonstrates Rocket's integration layer through a startup ideation use case, comparing it to Claude Code and examining whether its "vibe solutioning" approach represents genuine innovation or marketing.
writeup: The video reviews Rocket 1.0, a platform built to preserve context across multiple AI tools within a single workflow. It walks through building a startup MVP using Rocket together with Claude Code, Perplexity, and Cursor, testing whether the platform addresses context loss when switching between separate applications. The framing is practical: taking an idea to a working prototype in a compressed timeframe.
